name: movie-vector-service-runner
description: Runner for the Python-based movie vector service

scripts.start: cd ../vector_service && (if not exist venv python -m venv venv) && venv\Scripts\activate.bat && python movie_vector_service.py
scripts.install-deps: cd ../vector_service && (if not exist venv python -m venv venv) && venv\Scripts\activate.bat && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.dev: cd ../vector_service && (if not exist venv python -m venv venv) && venv\Scripts\activate.bat && python movie_vector_service.py
